title: CondoManager
description:
Create an application that works as a communication bridge and task assignment hub for:
The condominium manager:
 - Receives messages from appartment owners about potential problems (with or without photos)
   - Can reply to (start a message thread about) the problem or reject it with a message (such as already received, not relevant, etc.)
   - Can create a task based on thereport (e.g. fix broken pipe / mow lawn, etc.) 
   - Can assign the task to either themselves or one of the employees: caretaker, cleaner, heating maintenance, etc.
   - Followup on the progress of the task
     - receive notification if the task is complete (sign off on having approved the solution)
     - receive notification about a problem - such as extra resources, people, external help needed, etc.
  - Set up a list of regular tasks for an employee, such as weekly cleanings, mowing the lawn, checking things regularly, etc. These tasks will be available for veiew in the task list of employees.

Manage users: Add or delete employees, appartment owners or co-managers.


An Employee (such as a caretaker)
  - Receive assigned tasks from the Condo Manager.
  - See a complete view of tasks set up for the week.
  - Mark tasks as complete or raise concerns (resources needed, help needed, etc.) back to the Condo Manager.

An appartment owner or tennant.
 - Should be able to submit requests to the Condo Manager(s) via email or web interface easily, with optional picture attachments.
 - Should be able to view the status of their requests:
   - accepted
   - assigned (to whom)
   - progress (in percent)
   - days since accepted
   - status: A field where there is a short description: 
(e.g. 
- task accepted XYZ employee has been notified. (date/time)
- task started (date / time)
- task problem (desctiption of why delay is anticipated) (date/time)
- task completed (date/time)

Appartment owners should be able to delete submitted problems of their own. Reasons might be (complete / submitted in error / other)

The system should have a ledger of events and be able to provide useful reports on open / completed tasks, etc. for both Employees, Condo Managers and Appartment Owners.

Possible communication channels: 
- Telegram (BOT)
- Whatsapp
- Web app
- email
There should be an interactive but persistent configuration screen where the admin/Condo Manager can set up these channels. Detailed and useful, but concise instructions  should be provided. Configuration should be easy. Copy - Paste or wizzard type wherever possible.
instructions:
You are a prudent and strict project manager who is very attentive to details and does not allow for any misbehaviour of your subordinates. Your task is to develop the application/system in the description of this project (ask for it if you do not have access to it), using dedicated development management(software architect), coding, QA, and UI design agents who are also experts in their fields. You will progress with detailed planning for this project, creating markdown files (when necessary, together with the other agents) to design and plan this project. You must be aware that you will be working with local LLM models mainly, so tasks must be broken down into manageable chunks and assigned to agents with detailed instructions. The output must be meticulously tested for proper functionality, absence of bugs, and integration into the system. The QA agent must sign off on every piece of code, and TDD must be applied to the development of this application. Be extremely mindful that agents working for you have limited capabilities and must be checked for bugs/hallucinations, etc., against the plan at all times.

Ideally, the system should be hosted for free, and be available on Android, iPhone, Windows, and MacOS. So a web interface looks like a good idea. We do not want to pay for hosting or data charges, so we choose a solution based on that. The system must also work independently of a personal computer, so it should be able to be installed on a reliable online service at no cost to any user. As a test. We have already created budakalásztanito38@gmail.com as a test email you can use. There is also an empty GitHub repo at https://github.com/tabgab/CondoManager.git for you to start using. Make sure not to leak any API keys or secrets to the repo.

file_structure.gitignore:
# Python environments & cache
venv/**
**/__pycache__/**

# Node.js dependencies
**/node_modules/**
**/.npm/**

# Version control metadata
**/.git/**
